scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w api" "npm run dev -w ui"
scripts.lint:fallow: fallow dead-code && fallow dupes && fallow security
scripts.qa: npm run typecheck && npm run lint:fallow && npm run test && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:mutation
scripts.qa:fast: npm run typecheck && npm run lint:fallow && npm run test
